forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
As the early hours stretch into the dawn, Downtown San Francisco is shrouded in a gentle embrace of clouds, with the air curling softly around the skyline like a whispered secret. The mercury rests comfortably near 54 degrees, making for a crisp but not unwelcoming night. A subtle breeze from the southwest teases the leaves, hinting at the brighter hours ahead.

Upon the morrow, anticipation blooms with promises of sunshine. Expect the sky to don an array of blues as the day unfolds, with high temperatures swaying around 64 degrees before gently receding to around 62 in the afternoon. The winds, playful yet persistent at 7 to 14 mph, add a spirited edge to the day, perhaps rustling a few hats off unsuspecting heads. While the horizon may still flirt with remnants of fog along the coast, an inviting clarity reigns over the city.

Dressing in layers will be your ally today; a light sweater paired with a breezy shirt will suffice, allowing you to adapt as the warmth seeps in like a good conversation. As you navigate the streets, consider a slow stroll through the local parks or perhaps relish a moment at a charming café, indulging in a warm beverage as the world awakens around you. The day is ripe for those fleeting pleasures—an exhibition in a nearby gallery, a meander along the waterfront, or simply watching the dancers of shadows and light as they play across the bay under the cleansing sun.
